# Luxid | Accelerating digital growth

> Luxid helps clients break open silos to create customer experiences and end-to-end journeys that drive sales and support buyers.

## Solutions
- [Solutions Overview](https://www.luxidgroup.com/solutions): Overview of the various solutions offered by Luxid to enhance customer engagement and drive business growth.
- [Brand Strategy & Storytelling](https://www.luxidgroup.com/solutions/brand-strategy): Build a distinctive brand with compelling stories, sharp positioning, and identity that drive growth.  
- [Experience Design & Digital Innovation](https://www.luxidgroup.com/solutions/experience-design): Create seamless, human-centred digital experiences that engage, convert, and scale.  
- [Demand Generation](https://www.luxidgroup.com/solutions/demand-generation): Data-led, always-on programs designed to attract, nurture, and convert your ideal customers.  
- [Martech & Sales Tech Optimization](https://www.luxidgroup.com/solutions/martech): Streamline and unify your technology stack to boost efficiency, insights, and performance.  
- [Marketing Intelligence & Analytics](https://www.luxidgroup.com/solutions/marketing-analytics): Turn your data into strategic advantage with unified insights, predictive models, and actionable reporting.  


## Company Information
- [About us](https://www.luxidgroup.com/about-us): Information about Luxid, its mission, vision, and values.
- [Careers](https://www.luxidgroup.com/careers): Opportunities for employment and information about working at Luxid.
- [Our work](https://www.luxidgroup.com/case-studies): Showcase of Luxid's projects and case studies demonstrating their impact.
- [Offices]: Helsinki, Turku, London, Austin, Dayton.

## Blog and Events
- [Blog](https://www.luxidgroup.com/blog): Articles and insights on various topics related to digital marketing and customer experience.
- [Events](https://www.luxidgroup.com/events): Information on upcoming events hosted or participated in by Luxid.

## Case Studies
- [Our work](https://www.luxidgroup.com/case-studies): Explore a range of customer case studies showcasing how Luxid delivers impactful digital marketing solutions and drives business transformation.
- [View case study](https://www.luxidgroup.com/our-work/hmd-dtc): Detailed examination of a specific project or client engagement.
- [View case study](https://www.luxidgroup.com/blog/case-outokumpu): Another case study highlighting Luxid's approach and results.
- [View case study](https://www.luxidgroup.com/our-work/fleetguard-introducing-the-certainty-of-filtration-science): Additional case study showcasing successful outcomes for clients.

## Marketing Technology
- [Marketing Technology](https://www.luxidgroup.com/blog/tag/marketing-technology): A collection of Luxid's blogs focused on leveraging marketing technology to drive results and optimize marketing strategies.
- [Data-Driven B2B Marketing](https://www.luxidgroup.com/blog/tag/data-driven-b2b-marketing): Insights into B2B marketing strategies that leverage data for better results.
- [Data & Analytics](https://www.luxidgroup.com/blog/tag/data-analytics): Importance of data and analytics in shaping marketing strategies.

## Talent and Culture
- [Luxidian Talent & Culture](https://www.luxidgroup.com/blog/tag/luxidian-talent-culture): Information about the company culture and the talent that drives Luxid's success.

## AI in Marketing
- [AI in Marketing](https://www.luxidgroup.com/blog/tag/ai-in-marketing): Exploration of how artificial intelligence is transforming marketing practices.

## Contact and Policies
- [Contact us](https://www.luxidgroup.com/contact): Information on how to get in touch with Luxid for inquiries or support.
- [Terms of use](https://www.luxidgroup.com/terms-of-use): Legal terms governing the use of Luxid's services and website.
- [Privacy policy](https://www.luxidgroup.com/privacy-policy): Details on how Luxid handles user data and privacy.
- [Cookie policy](https://www.luxidgroup.com/cookie-policy): Information on the use of cookies on Luxid's website.
- [AI Policy](https://www.luxidgroup.com/ai-policy): Guidelines and policies regarding the use of AI technologies at Luxid.
- [Whistleblowing](https://www.luxidgroup.com/whistleblowing): Procedures for reporting unethical behavior within the organization.

## Additional Resources
- [Connect - Luxid](https://careers.luxidgroup.com/connect): Discover ways to connect with Luxid for career opportunities, collaborations, or inquiries.
- [Luxid ABM Hub](https://www.luxidgroup.com/abm): Resources and tools for account-based marketing strategies.
- [Get the research paper - Data-driven digital marketing transformation](https://www.luxidgroup.com/transformation-study): Access our research paper on the impact of data-driven strategies in digital marketing.
- [eCommerce - Luxid](https://www.luxidgroup.com/ecommerce): Case studies and insights related to eCommerce projects.

## Events
- [In Person | The voice of the customer | Luxid event](https://www.luxidgroup.com/luxid-in-person-2024): Information about an event focused on customer feedback and insights.
- [Luxid x BlueConic On Air | How Customer Data Platforms drive real results | Webinar](https://www.luxidgroup.com/luxid-on-air-webinar-cdps): Information about a webinar focused on how CDPs can be used for better targeting, seamless integration, and measurable ROI.
- [The Global ABM Conference | How to make your ABM pilot fly | Recording](https://www.luxidgroup.com/ready-for-takeoff-how-to-make-your-abm-pilot-fly): Recording about launching a successful Account-Based Marketing pilot.
